caption: A man with blond hair, glasses, and a thin mustache wearing a dark blue shirt and white headphones sits in a room decorated with a Christmas tree. He is reacting to an American football game being broadcast on his screen. The game features players in dark jerseys facing off against the "COMMANDERS" on a green field, with on-screen text indicating it is "3rd & Goal" during the "2nd" quarter with "3:31" remaining. Banners in the stadium read "SUPER BOWL CHAMPIONS XVII XXVIII XXXIV" and "WORLD CHAMPIONS 1837 1942". The man's expressions shift from a slight smile to a focused, open-mouthed look of surprise or intensity. In some views, a picture-in-picture window shows the man's reaction overlaid on the football game, while other views focus solely on his face as he watches the action unfold.
